reason: The remediation only edits /etc/postfix/main.cf to set smtpd_client_restrictions, which is a standard STIG hardening step. It does not affect SSH, sudo, or critical system boot components. The change is reversible and can be tested before production rollout.
estimated_impact: networking affected; filesystems affected; Potential disruption of mail delivery if local network restrictions are misapplied; Remote mail clients may be unable to send mail until proper relay permissions are configured
